Today we’ll continue our discussion of writing functions (yes, again…I promise their important). But today, we’ll add a new tool to our arsenal – writing a reporter function!

Note: The video capture software in the auditorium failed to capture the slides / screen for this lecture. If you’re having trouble seeing the slides or IDLE windows, remember you can see the slides at the below link and the IDLE files we worked on by clicking the big purple button. Hopefully NUIT will fix it soon.

If there’s something you can’t see, just post on Campuswire and I can clarify!
